summary: Completed testing of optional login features for Customer App. Backend APIs working correctly, core login functionality implemented and working. Critical routing issue found affecting guest checkout flow.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 instead of 401 for invalid OTP when phone not registered
minor_issues.impact: May confuse error handling, but functional

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend fails to load when restaurant ID in URL path (e.g., /test-restaurant)
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks guest checkout flow - Browse Menu button only appears with restaurant ID

ui_bugs.issue: Browse Menu button missing when no restaurant ID in URL
ui_bugs.impact: Guest checkout not accessible from main landing page

working_correctly: Login button appears in top-right corner
Login page loads with phone input and Send OTP button
Send OTP functionality (handles unregistered phone appropriately)

passed_tests: Landing page loads at root URL with login button
Login button navigation to /login page works
Login page elements present (phone input, Send OTP button)
Send OTP API integration works (shows expected error for unregistered phone)
Authentication protection working on protected routes

success_percentage.backend: 90% (8/9 tests passed - minor auth error handling issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 60% (core login works, but guest checkout routing broken)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend routing issue where URLs with restaurant ID (e.g., /test-restaurant) fail to load. The Browse Menu button only appears when restaurant ID is present in URL, but such URLs cause the app to error. This breaks the guest checkout flow which is essential for the optional login feature to work properly. Also investigate why Browse Menu button is missing at root URL - users should be able to browse menu without login.
